    • services/api/workspaceService
    • WorkspaceService

    Variable WorkspaceServiceConst

    WorkspaceService: {
        addWorkspace(data: { name: string }): Promise<any>;
        addWorkspaceMember(
            data: { userID: string; workspaceID: string },
        ): Promise<any>;
        deleteWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>;
        getWorkspaceMembers(workspaceID: string): Promise<WorkspaceMembersDTO[]>;
        getWorkspacesOfUser(): Promise<WorkspaceDTO[]>;
        getWorkspaceWithID(id: string): Promise<any>;
        removeWorkspaceMember(workspaceID: string, userID: string): Promise<string>;
        saveWorkspace(data: { id: string; name: string }): Promise<any>;
    } = ...

    Client for the workspace endpoints (create/rename/delete workspaces, add/remove members, and query workspaces and members). Methods throw on a non-OK response.

    Type Declaration

    • addWorkspace: function
      • addWorkspace(data: { name: string }): Promise<any>

        Creates a new workspace (the current user becomes its owner).

        Parameters

        • data: { name: string }

          The workspace name.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The created workspace.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:21
    • addWorkspaceMember: function
      • addWorkspaceMember(data: { userID: string; workspaceID: string }): Promise<any>

        Adds a user as a member to a workspace (owner only).

        Parameters

        • data: { userID: string; workspaceID: string }

          The target workspace and the user to add.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The new member payload.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:45
    • deleteWorkspace: function
      • deleteWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<any>

        Deletes a workspace (owner only).

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace to delete.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The server confirmation payload.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:103
    • getWorkspaceMembers: function
      • getWorkspaceMembers(workspaceID: string): Promise<WorkspaceMembersDTO[]>

        Returns all members of a workspace with their profile and role.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace.

        Returns Promise<WorkspaceMembersDTO[]>

        The list of members.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:188
    • getWorkspacesOfUser: function
      • getWorkspacesOfUser(): Promise<WorkspaceDTO[]>

        Returns all workspaces the current user owns or is a member of.

        Returns Promise<WorkspaceDTO[]>

        The list of workspaces.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:161
    • getWorkspaceWithID: function
      • getWorkspaceWithID(id: string): Promise<any>

        Returns a single workspace by its ID.

        Parameters

        • id: string

          The workspace ID.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The workspace.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:146
    • removeWorkspaceMember: function
      • removeWorkspaceMember(workspaceID: string, userID: string): Promise<string>

        Removes a member from a workspace (owner only; the owner cannot be removed).

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace.

        • userID: string

          The member to remove.

        Returns Promise<string>

        The server response text.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:122
    • saveWorkspace: function
      • saveWorkspace(data: { id: string; name: string }): Promise<any>

        Renames a workspace (owner only).

        Parameters

        • data: { id: string; name: string }

          The workspace ID and the new name.

        Returns Promise<any>

        The updated workspace.

        • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:71
    • Defined in services/api/workspaceService.ts:13
